title: Junior Business Development Manager at Synergy Property Development

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Synergy Property Development
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!
